summary: OxaPay payment integration and A/B testing system fully verified. All tests PASSED. OxaPay returns valid payment URLs (https://pay.oxapay.com/...), A/B tracking works for view/click/conversion events, and stats endpoint returns correct aggregated data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OxaPay and A/B testing fully functional. OxaPay API key EWVVRZ-Y40MQP-ZZBKWM-GRJ8UT is working in production mode (sandbox=false). A/B experiment 'best_value_label' has data in db.ab_events collection.
